name: Senior Archivist Pell
rank: Senior Archivist — Head of the Glass Sigil
sd_appearance: a wiry gnome of diminutive stature, pale skin etched with faint runes, wild white hair cascading in tangled strands, and eyes sharp behind thick spectacles that magnify their amber glow, draped in pale blue scholar robes stained with ink and annotated with marginalia, brass instrument clips jingling at his cuffs, glass-lens goggles perched atop his head, hands stained deep black with ink, a staff crackling with arcane energy in one hand, and a swarm of floating parchment fragments orbiting his head like trapped fireflies, one eye flicking toward a semi-transparent, shifting archive hovering just beyond his shoulder.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
